result:
Here's the complete authentication and session management inventory for this codebase:

---

## Middleware (Token Validation Layer)

| File | Class | Purpose |
|------|-------|---------|
| `app/Http/Middleware/OauthMiddleware.php` | `OauthMiddleware` | Validates OAuth2 access tokens from `Authorization` header against DB |
| `app/Http/Middleware/MerchantMiddleware.php` | `MerchantMiddleware` | Validates JWT (HS256 via Firebase\JWT) for merchant API endpoints |
| `app/Http/Middleware/webMiddleware.php` | `webMiddleware` | Validates JWT OR legacy time-based token (`sha1(md5(md5(time|salt)))`) for web endpoints |
| `app/Http/Middleware/thirdPartyToken.php` | `thirdPartyToken` | Validates third-party client tokens against `thirdPartyTokens` table with expiry checks |
| `app/Http/Middleware/Authenticate.php` | `Authenticate` | Standard Laravel auth guard check |
| `app/Http/Middleware/apiMonitorMiddleware.php` | `apiMonitorMiddleware` | API request monitoring, host validation, store access controls |

## Controllers (Login / Token Generation)

| File | Key Methods | Purpose |
|------|-------------|---------|
| `app/Http/Controllers/userController.php` | `loginCheck()`, `loginCheckQB()` | v1 user login, JWT generation with 30-min expiry |
| `app/Http/Controllers/v2/userController.php` | `loginCheck()`, `refreshJWT()`, `buildWebJwtPayload()` | v2 login, JWT refresh with fingerprint validation |
| `app/Http/Controllers/oauthController.php` | `getOAuthToken()` | OAuth2 device token generation, serial number / client credential validation |
| `app/Http/Controllers/basicAppController.php` | `generateOauthToken()`, `generateClient()` | Alternative OAuth token endpoint + client credential creation |

## Models (Authentication Logic)

| File | Key Methods | Purpose |
|------|-------------|---------|
| `app/users.php` | `loginCheck()`, `loginCheckQB()`, `checkEmail()`, `checkOtp()` | Full auth logic: password validation, session ID generation, OTP with rate limiting (Redis), permissions loading |
| `app/Merchant.php` | `loginCheck()` | Merchant login: validates username/password/serialNumber against `users` table |

## Session & Config

| File | Details |
|------|---------|
| `config/session.php` | Driver: Redis, Lifetime: 120 min, Cookie: `laravel_session` |

## Key Auth Routes

```
POST /oauth/token                    → basicAppController@generateOauthToken
POST /v1/oauth/newClient             → basicAppController@generateClient
POST /v1/merchant/login              → userController@loginCheck
POST /v2/merchant/login              → userController@loginCheck
POST /v2/merchant/refreshJwt         → userController@refreshJWT
POST /v1/merchant/loginApp           → basicAppController@loginApp
```

## Crypto Details

- **Passwords**: `sha1(sha1(md5(sha1(md5($password)))))`
- **JWT**: HS256 with `env("JWT_KEY")`, 30-min expiry, Firebase\JWT library
- **Session ID**: `md5(rand(100000000,999999999) | $userID)` → hashed into JWT `extraparam` for fingerprint validation
- **Legacy web token**: `sha1(md5(md5(time|"Nikhil")))` (time-based, salt hardcoded in webMiddleware)
- **OAuth tokens**: Generated via `oauth2->handleTokenRequest()`, stored in `oauth_access_token` table with `isActive` flag
